name: ich-monorepo
description: Inter-Department Collaboration Hub — run all servers

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" --names "BACKEND,REACT,ANGULAR" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix student-portal" "cd admin-portal && npx ng serve"
scripts.build: npm run build:react && npm run build:angular && npm run build:copy
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix student-portal && npm install --prefix admin-portal
